channel.title: Security Scanning on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Security Scanning on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Incremental analysis for Go, C/C++, and CodeQL CLI
item.description:
CodeQL pull request scans for C/C++ and Go now use incremental analysis, which makes them faster. GitHub says this builds on earlier incremental analysis improvements for other languages and CodeQL CLI.

  • Source: GitHub
